name: Threat Model
description: Identify assets, attackers, entry points, trust boundaries, risks, mitigations.

name: Repo Hardening
description: Inspect repo for exposed secrets, weak configs, unsafe permissions, .gitignore gaps.

name: Secret Scan
description: Search local repo for accidental secrets and mask findings.

name: Dependency Review
description: Review dependency files for risky packages. Network only with approval.

name: Safe Vulnerability Explanation
description: Explain vulnerabilities defensively and suggest remediation.

name: Incident Notes
description: Create calm incident notes, evidence checklist, timeline, defensive next actions.
